name: @platform/profile-configuration
description: Generic user profile and configuration domain package for preferences, settings, entitlements, and runtime configuration models.

readme.summary: DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by apps/platform-api usecases/profile.ts + ports/profile-repository.ts; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Generic user profile and configuration domain package for preferences, settings, entitlements, and runtime configuration models.
responsibilities: Own profile and configuration domain models
Define validation and policy rules for user-scoped and organisation-scoped configuration
Expose pure TypeScript APIs for profile/configuration reads and updates
nonResponsibilities: Does not connect directly to PostgreSQL
Does not own analytical event storage
Does not evaluate access-control role policy
usage: Do not add new consumers — this package is deprecated (ADR-0006), retained only until its removal review 2026-12-18.
operationalNotes: Transactional profile/configuration storage is expected to be PostgreSQL-backed through the PostgreSQL adapter package
